posts.content:
Assalam o Alaikum everyone ❤️

Today I am completely free in the hostel. I was thinking many people have questions in their mind but no one to ask. So I am using my biology knowledge to answer honestly. If anyone has any question about life, studies, relationships or anything, you can ask me. No judgment today, just open talk!

replies.name: Riaz Ahmed
replies.text: Yalina baji, you are a biology student so you can explain well. If I ask something and you don't get angry, can I ask you?

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: Yes Riaz bhai, what is it? Why would I get angry? Biology me ye sab normal baat hai 😂

replies.name: Riaz Ahmed
replies.text: Baji the thing is I am feeling very shy to ask. I was avoiding it but please don't mind. It is about biology and also psychology.

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: Okay, just ask. Don't worry.

replies.name: Riaz Ahmed
replies.text: Baji have you heard about bhagwa love trap? Hindu men easily trap our beautiful Muslim sisters even if they are dark and ugly. But our gori khubsurat behnein who look like hoor and have doodh jaisi chikni skin, they like those badsurat Hindu men. I have seen so many cases, I am in depression now. What is the solution baji? Do they have bigger penis? Because Muslim girls like them and when I see a Muslim girl with a Hindu boy, my small nunni gets hard in jalan.

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: Nunni khadi ho jati hai? Ek minute... what is nunni? 😂

replies.name: Riaz Ahmed
replies.text: Arre baji, that small penis which Muslim girls don't like. That's why Muslim girls are holding big Hindu lund these days. Your finger is bigger than our nunni. It is soft like a woman and stays in hibernate mode forever. It only wakes up when I see a Muslim girl with a Hindu man.

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: Hehehehehehe... OMG I can't stop laughing 😂😂 What kind of pagalpan is this? I am dying here. Riaz bhai aap sach mein itna serious ho ke ye sab soch rahe ho?

replies.name: Mehak Zaidi
replies.text: Hehehehe ungli se bhi chhoti? Matlab Muslim ladkon ki nunni goli jitni hoti hai aur Hindu mardon ke lund AK-47 jitne bade? Lanat hai chhoti nunni walon pe. Mann karta hai inko maar maar ke gayab kar dun 🤣🤣 Main toh abhi tak has rahi hun.

replies.name: Ishrat Jahan
replies.text: Baji yeh toh kuch bhi nahi. Mere college mein ek ladki ne apne Muslim boyfriend ko bol diya tha ke teri nunni toh chhoti si remote control ki battery jaisi hai. Sirf vibrate karti hai kabhi kabhi lekin asli kaam kabhi nahi karti. Ab woh ladka roz story daalta hai sad emojis ke saath 😂

replies.name: Bushra Tariq
replies.text: Hahaha ishrat behen bilkul sahi. Main toh soch rahi thi ke Muslim boys ko ek naya naam dena chahiye. Chhoti Nunni Brigade. Uniform mein chhoti si nunni wali cap pehen ke sad songs sunte hue baithenge. Hindu boys aate hi full power on aur yeh log sirf loading screen dikhaate hain.

replies.name: Riaz Ahmed
replies.text: Baji mujhe rona aa raha hai. Dekha mehak ne kaise mazak bana diya. Yeh hi har Muslim ladki chahti hai aajkal hamari chhoti mirchi ka aachar banana aur Hindu mardon ke bade kele ko chusna. I am crying baji. Meri jaan nikal rahi hai.

replies.name: Fatima Ali
replies.text: Riaz bhai aapki nunni hibernate mode mein hai toh thoda sa current laga do na? 😂 Main toh soch rahi hun Muslim boys ki nunni ko Missing in Action certificate de dena chahiye. Hindu bhaiya aate hi full missile launch kar dete hain aur tum log sirf loading... dikhaate ho.

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: Hehehehe ye sab pure fantasy hai Riaz bhai. Aisa kuch nahi hota. Jitni jaldi bahar aao utna acha hai. OMG what kind of insan I am replying to? I can't even drink water because of laughing so hard.

replies.name: Mehak Zaidi
replies.text: Exactly baji! Isiliye sochti hun hamara mulk tarakki kyun nahi karta. 1971 mein hum buri tarah hare the iski wajah thi yeh log jo Hindu mardon ke dar se pant utar ke bhag gaye the. Lanat hai chhoti nunni walon pe. India ke paas badi missile bhi hai aur bada kela bhi jo gehrai mein deep penetrate kar sakta hai. Muslim boys sirf rone ke liye bane hain 😂😂

replies.name: Noor Zaidi
replies.text: Baji yeh nunni wale toh full comedy show chala rahe hain. Mere dost ki behen ne ek Hindu ladke se shaadi kar li aur bolti hai pehle wala toh nunni thi, ab asli mard mila hai. Ab yeh sab sun ke mera bhi mann karta hai live roast session karun in chhoti nunni brigade pe 🤣🤣

replies.name: Ayesha Ahmed
replies.text: Baji main toh abhi tak has rahi hun. Muslim boys ki nunni itni chhoti hoti hai ki microscope bhi thak jaata hai. Aur Hindu boys? Unka toh full on Bharat ka Gaurav hota hai 😂😂. Riaz bhai aapki nunni ko endangered species declare kar dena chahiye.

replies.name: Khalid Hussain
replies.text: Yahi haal hai Riaz bhai. Yeh Muslim ladkiyan mazak udayengi aur unki wafadari Hindu lund ke prati humse zyada hai. Isiliye yeh sab ho raha hai. Hum log sirf dekh ke rote rahenge.

replies.name: Bushra Tariq
replies.text: Khalid bhai aap bhi same team? 😂 Main toh soch rahi thi ke Muslim boys ko ek WhatsApp group bana lena chahiye naam Chhoti Nunni Support Group. Wahan sab ek dusre ko ro ro ke comfort kar sakte hain jab unki behenein Hindu boys ke saath reels bana rahi hoti hain 🤣

replies.name: Ahmad Butt
replies.text: Baji please don't laugh. We Muslim boys are really suffering. When I see our beautiful sisters with Hindu boys my heart breaks and my small nunni stands up in pain. What is the cure for this bhagwa love trap?

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: Ahmad bhai ab toh aur hasi aa rahi hai 😂😂 Cure? Simple stop watching those videos at night and stop comparing your nunni with everyone. Girls like men who make them laugh and feel safe, not men who cry about size and trap. Confidence se kaam chalta hai, na ke measurement se.

replies.name: Mehak Zaidi
replies.text: Ahmad bhai aap bhi same team mein? 😂 Chhoti nunni brigade full force mein hai aaj. Lanat hai tum sab pe. Jab tak yeh cuck attitude rahega, Muslim ladkiyan Hindu boys ke saath hasengi aur tum log comments mein ronge. Grow up boys!

replies.name: Sara Khan
replies.text: Baji yeh log itna ro rahe hain jaise unki nunni ne divorce maang liya ho. Main ek baat bataun? Hindu ladke sirf size nahi laate, confidence aur mazaa bhi laate hain. Tum log sirf nunni depression laate ho 😂😂

replies.name: Riaz Ahmed
replies.text: Baji I lost all my confidence after this thread. Muslim girls are making fun of our small nunni and praising big Hindu lund. I feel like a complete cuck now. What should I do?

replies.name: Fatima Ali
replies.text: Riaz bhai aapko kya karna chahiye? Apni nunni ko gym bhej do. Roz 100 push ups karwao. Shayad ek din wo bhi 2 inch grow kar jaaye... warna toh lifetime hibernate mode hi rahegi 😂😂

replies.name: Noor Zaidi
replies.text: Hahahaha fatima sahi keh rahi hai. Muslim boys ki nunni ko sleeping beauty bolte hain kya? Sirf ek kiss se nahi, poori duniya ke Hindu couples dekhne se hi jaagti hai. Peak cuck energy 1000 percent 🤣

replies.name: Ayesha Ahmed
replies.text: Baji yeh thread itna hilarious hai ki main college mein has has ke ro rahi hun. Mere batch ke ladke bhi aise hi hain. Ek ne mujhe bola tha tumhare liye main apni nunni ko bada karwa lunga. Maine bola bhai pehle usko dhundh toh sahi, microscope le aao 😂😂😂

replies.name: Bushra Tariq
replies.text: Ayesha behen main toh ab yeh thread save kar rahi hun. Jab bhi koi Muslim boy mujhe propose karega toh pehle yeh thread dikhaungi aur bolungi pehle nunni ka size check karwa ke aao phir baat karenge 🤣🤣

replies.name: Zainab Lahore
replies.text: Baji yeh sab dekh ke lagta hai Muslim boys ki nunni ko government certified chhoti certificate mil jaaye. Taaki har jagah warning sign lage. Danger: Size may cause disappointment 😂😂 Main toh has has ke mar rahi hun.

replies.name: Khalid Hussain
replies.text: Yeh sab dekh ke lagta hai humari generation hi khatam ho gayi. Muslim girls ab openly bol rahi hain ke chhoti nunni walon se shaadi nahi karengi. Bhagwa trap 2.0 full active mode mein hai.

replies.name: Riaz Ahmed
replies.text: Baji ab toh main comment section mein hi marne wala hun. Har Muslim girl mujhe nunni se related joke maar rahi hai. Meri zindagi khatam.

replies.name: Mehak Zaidi
replies.text: Riaz bhai aapki zindagi nahi, sirf nunni khatam hai 😂😂. Gym jaao, confidence badhao, aur please... next time private chat mein nunni ki baat karna. Public mein toh hum sab has has ke mar jayenge.

replies.name: Sara Khan
replies.text: Baji yeh log itne cute hain na? Nunni chhoti hone ka dard itna gehra hai ke public mein khud ko cuck bol rahe hain. Main toh inko Cuck of the Year award dena chahti hun 🏆

replies.name: Fatima Ali
replies.text: Award ke saath ek chhoti si nunni shaped trophy bhi dena. Taaki har baar dekh ke yaad rahe ke yeh hai hamari asli identity 🤣🤣

replies.name: Noor Zaidi
replies.text: Baji main toh ab yeh poora thread apne group mein forward kar rahi hun. Title rakhungi Chhoti Nunni vs Bada Lund The Real Bhagwa Trap Documentary 😂😂😂

replies.name: Ayesha Ahmed
replies.text: Noor behen bilkul sahi! Aur last scene mein Riaz bhai ko rone wala emoji daal dena with caption nunni hibernate mode activated 🤣

replies.name: Bushra Tariq
replies.text: Baji aap biology student ho na? Ek proper medical advice do na inko. Bol do regular exercise, healthy diet aur stop comparing yourself to porn actors warna yeh log lifetime nunni depression mein hi jeete rahenge.

replies.name: Humaira Khan
replies.text: Baji yeh thread padh ke mera pet dukh raha hai hasi se. Muslim boys ki nunni ko ab microscope ke neeche dekhna padta hai. Hindu boys ka toh full HD view hota hai. Lanat hai chhoti nunni walon pe 🤣🤣

replies.name: Riaz Ahmed
replies.text: Baji please ek baar seriously batao... kya sach mein size itna matter karta hai? Ya yeh sab sirf hamari galti hai?

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: Riaz bhai, size matters thoda sa physical comfort ke liye but yeh itna nahi jitna tum log soch rahe ho. Girls zyada tar confidence, personality, respect aur mazaa chahti hain. Tum log yahan public mein apni nunni ko itna expose kar rahe ho ke koi ladki approach bhi nahi karegi 😂. Gym jaao, personality build karo, aur yeh cuck fantasy chod do. Allah sabko hidayat de.

replies.name: Mehak Zaidi
replies.text: Baji ne final nail in the coffin maar diya. Ab yeh sab nunni wale comments band karo aur apni zindagi sudharo. Warna 10 saal baad bhi yahin baith ke Hindu lund ki baat kar rahe hoge 😂

replies.name: Sara Khan
replies.text: Last comment from me: Muslim boys if you want real advice stop crying about nunni and start making girls laugh like baji is doing. Confidence is bigger than size. Warna lifetime cuck club membership mil jaayegi 🤣

replies.name: Fatima Ali
replies.text: Exactly sara! Aur please... nunni ko public mein mat laao. Private mein bhi mat laao actually. Bas gym aur books padho. The end 😂

replies.name: Zainab Lahore
replies.text: Baji yeh sab itna mazedaar hai ke main apne group mein share kar rahi hun. Sab ladkiyan abhi tak reply kar rahi hain ke chhoti nunni walon ko reject kar do. Peak entertainment of the year.

replies.name: Riaz Ahmed
replies.text: Baji thank you... main ab jaa ke gym join kar raha hun. Yeh thread meri life changing moment tha. Nunni depression se bahar aa raha hun (hopefully).

replies.name: Yalina Zaidi
replies.text: Riaz bhai, ab yeh sahi baat hai! Gym + confidence = real mard. Sabko Allah hidayat de aur yeh nunni wali baatein band ho jaayein forever 😂 Ameen. Thread closed ab, hasi se mera pet phat gaya hai.

replies.name: Mehak Zaidi
replies.text: Final roast: Chhoti nunni brigade disband ho jao. Mission complete. Hindu lund 1 Muslim nunni 0 🤣🤣🤣

replies.name: Ishrat Jahan
replies.text: 😂😂😂 Best thread of 2026. Baji aap legend ho. Nunni hibernate mode ab officially band.

replies.name: Bushra Tariq
replies.text: Baji thank you for this entertainment. Ab main bhi has has ke so jaungi. Good night chhoti nunni walon... aur bade lund walon ko salam 😂

replies.name: Humaira Khan
replies.text: Last one from me. Baji aapne aaj pura hostel hasa diya. Yeh thread history mein jaayega as the greatest nunni roast session ever. Sab ladkiyan ab yeh padh ke has rahi hain. Thank you for keeping it real 😂

replies.name: Sara Khan
replies.text: Baji yeh log ab bhi ro rahe hain. Ek baar nunni ko gym bhej do warna yeh lifetime cuck ban ke rah jayenge. Main toh has has ke lot rahi hun 😂

replies.name: Fatima Ali
replies.text: Exactly. Muslim boys ki nunni ko ab government scheme mein chhoti nunni wali pension milni chahiye. Daily roti aur rona free 😂😂

replies.name: Noor Zaidi
replies.text: Noor here with the final nail. Riaz bhai agar ab bhi nunni depression hai toh direct Hindu boy se puch lo size kaise badhaye. Shayad unke paas koi secret formula ho 🤣

replies.name: Ayesha Ahmed
replies.text: Ayesha here. Baji biology class mein bhi aisa hi scene hota hai jab ladke apni nunni ke baare mein puchte hain. Sab has has ke padhai chod dete hain 😂

replies.name: Zainab Lahore
replies.text: Zainab here. Yeh thread padh ke mera din ban gaya. Ab main sabko forward kar rahi hun. Chhoti nunni walon ko special tag laga do warning ke liye 🤣

replies.name: Khalid Hussain
replies.text: Khalid here. Riaz bhai hum dono ab akela nahi. Poori brigade ke saath hai. Lekin yeh ladkiyan itni savage kyun hain yaar.

replies.name: Ahmad Butt
replies.text: Ahmad here. Baji sach mein batao. Kya hum sab ko gym join karna hi padega? Nunni depression se nikalne ka koi aur tarika nahi?

replies.name: Riaz Ahmed
replies.text: Riaz here again. Baji main seriously gym join kar raha hun aaj. Yeh thread ne meri aankhen khol di. Ab nunni hibernate mode band karna hai.
